creator: adamskelton@sbcglobal.net
text: I think I may have the same bug, but this is on a Raspberry Pi 3 running arm64, with a default install of 12.0-RELEASE. It happens with two different USB wireless keyboards. It happens on the console and vt's, I'm not running X. I have been able to capture a usbdump while it's happening (attached). Running tshark (or usbdump) on the capture file shows that there is an I/O error happening. I'm not a USB guru, so that's as far as I can analyze it, but if someone who really understands the USB stack can contact me, I'd be happy to run a dtrace script while it's happening or offer SSH access to the machine for testing.
